attacking_style: Prone to mistimed efforts: launches either too early (sprint openings before final corners) or unsustainably long (35km solo breakaways). Opportunistic rather than calculated in positioning.
team_tactics: Functions as protective domestique throughout stage, then capitalizes on chaotic sprint finishes when leadout trains collapse. Not a designated sprint leader with dedicated train.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where chaos creates opportunity. Struggles to convert advantages even on home terrain where local knowledge should favor him.
vulnerability: Poor timing judgment in critical moments: opens sprints prematurely, misjudges sustainability of long-range attacks. Relies on disorganization rather than controlled execution.
key_patterns: Wins through opportunism when favorites crash or hesitate, not dominant sprint power (2 observations)
Mistimes decisive efforts repeatedly: too early in sprints, too far out in breakaways (2 observations)
Works domestique role before attempting own result in compromised finishes (2 observations)
Fails to convert home region advantages into tactical victories despite local knowledge (1 observation)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2020 win shows opportunistic capability but pattern of mistimed efforts persists across 2017-2018 appearances
